nasb.text: Because you have looted many nations, All the remainder of the peoples will loot you— Because of human bloodshed and violence done to the land, To the town and all its inhabitants.

esv.text: Because you have plundered many nations, all the remnant of the peoples shall plunder you, for the blood of man and violence to the earth, to cities and all who dwell in them.

cnv.text: 因你搶掠多國，殺人流血， 向全地各城和其中所有居民施行暴力， 所以剩下的人也必搶掠你。

ccb.text: 你们从前掳掠许多国家， 杀人流血， 摧毁他们的土地、城市和人民， 所以各国的余民必掠夺你们。
